calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-28-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Alan Crowley, Esq. of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, 510-839-6600 for petitioner and moving party American Federation of Musicians, Local 6

RULING:
The Court REVERSED its Tentative Ruling:
PETITIONER AMERICAN FEDERATION OF MUSICIANS, LOCAL 6'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award was granted. THe Court clarified irregulairty of service. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558
